title: Project Metadata Configuration
description: Schema for tracking project metadata, repository paths, and update rules for the portfolio website

defaults.description: Default values applied to all projects unless overridden

descriptionPrompt.description: Path to the prompt template for generating descriptions

projects.description: List of projects to track and display on the website

id.description: Unique identifier for the project (lowercase, hyphenated)

name.description: Display name for the project on the website

repoPath.description: Absolute or relative path to the project's local git repository

description.description: Current description displayed on the website

enabled.description: Whether the project is actively tracked and displayed

url.description: Public URL for the project (GitHub, docs, etc.)

updateRules.description: Rules governing when and how the project description should be updated

triggers.description: Events that trigger a description update

sources.description: Data sources to consider when generating descriptions

lastUpdated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last description update

updateFrequency.description: How often to check for updates
